subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted unto the Truth! That which thou didst write was read and perused with the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب الی الحق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی قرائت و تلاوت گردید و بنهایت روح و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity, @spiritual transformation, @martyrdom of the Bab
